sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115551" key="yeudoprodosi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδο-προδοσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n115551.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pretended treachery,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:3:9:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.9.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
